prompt: Create a reusable high-end Chinese fantasy game UI panel kit in a jade-parchment style: pale parchment body, muted warm paper texture, elegant jade-green header band, low-saturation gold trims, natural integrated frame edges, subtle inner shadow, no black heavy metal look, no purple fantasy glow, commercial mobile game UI quality, modular panel kit for 9-slice production.
negativePrompt: dark black metal frame, neon purple, sci-fi, exaggerated bevel, thick drop shadow, logo, text, watermark, character illustration, weapon, battle scene, poster composition
postProcess: approve before moving to final runtime path
notes: First formal recipe for the GeneralDetail jade-parchment panel family. Output should be reusable by multiple detail-split screens, not bound to one single page screenshot.
